name: Stretch Cotton Chinos
description: Smart-casual chinos with just the right amount of stretch for all-day comfort. Available in three fits so you can find your perfect silhouette. A wardrobe workhorse that pairs with everything from oxfords to sneakers.
specs: 97% cotton 3% spandex twill, 8.5 oz midweight fabric, Available in Slim Fit, Straight Fit, and Relaxed Fit, Each fit available in waist sizes 28-42, Inseam options: 30, 32, 34 inch, Angled front pockets, Welt back pockets with button closure, Machine wash warm, Tumble dry low, Wrinkle-resistant finish
warranty: 45-day fit guarantee. If the chinos don't fit, exchange them for a different size or fit at no cost. We'll even help you figure out which fit works best based on your measurements.
shipping: Free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Standard delivery 3-5 business days. Express 1-2 day shipping available for $9.99.
